analysis.name: Bitcoin SV
analysis.summary: BSV近期7日涨幅超25%，但基本面缺乏实质利好，主要受市场情绪和低流动性推动。项目争议大，Coinbase已下架，且面临法律诉讼。当前价格远低于历史高点，上涨持续性存疑。

recommendation.invalidation: 若出现重大合作或技术突破，可重新评估。

catalysts: 部分投资者押注BSV作为比特币分叉的反弹潜力
低流动性下少量资金即可推动价格

latestNews.title: UK Supreme Court refuses BSV appeal, narrowing $13 billion lawsuit against crypto exchanges
latestNews.reason: 法律诉讼受挫，可能影响市场信心和交易所支持

latestNews.title: Coinbase Ending Support for Bitcoin SV
latestNews.reason: 主流交易所下架，流动性和可访问性下降

latestNews.title: BSV Suffers 51% Attack: Report
latestNews.reason: 网络安全问题，损害信任

fundamentals: BSV是比特币现金的分叉，旨在恢复中本聪原始愿景
支持大区块和低费用，但采用率低
流通供应约2005万枚，接近最大供应2100万枚
marketRead: 7日涨幅25%，但24小时仅涨6.6%，动量减弱
DEX上BSV/USDC流动性约153万美元，交易量14万美元，流动性低
价格远低于历史高点489.75美元，ATH跌幅97%
无近期成交量放大迹象
risks: 法律诉讼风险：13亿美元诉讼可能影响交易所支持
交易所下架风险：Coinbase已下架，其他交易所可能跟进
网络安全风险：曾遭51%攻击
流动性风险：DEX流动性低，大额交易滑点高
基本面薄弱：缺乏实际应用和开发者生态
watchlist: 主要交易所是否维持交易对
sourceNotes: 新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分标题可能不完整
DEX数据仅反映Solana上的BSV/USDC交易对，非主流BSV交易场所

profile.name: Bitcoin SV
profile.description: Bitcoin SV (BSV) emerged following a hard fork of the Bitcoin Cash (BCH) blockchain in 2018, which had in turn forked from the BTC blockchain a year earlier. The goal of Bitcoin SV is to fulfil the original vision of the Bitcoin protocol and design as described in Satoshi Nakamoto’s white paper, early Bitcoin client software and known Satoshi writings. BSV aims to offer scalability and stability in line with the original description of Bitcoin as a peer-to-peer electronic cash system, as well as deliver a distributed data network that can support enterprise-level advanced blockchain applications. To this end, it has removed artificial block size limits and re-enabled Script commands and other technical capabilities which had been historically disabled or restricted by the protocol developers of the BTC blockchain. This allows the network to process tens of thousands of transactions per second while maintaining extremely low transaction fees for micropayments, in addition to offering advanced capabilities such as tokens, smart contracts, computation and other data use cases. The BSV network is unique in its capacity for unbounded on-chain scaling while also being more aligned with t
